descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical properties and deformation behavior

quality.notes: complete representation of average grain size

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.physical_meaning: preferred crystallographic orientation distribution in polycrystal
descriptors.rationale: determines anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

quality.loss_reason: truncation of infinite spherical harmonics series
quality.truncation_error: depends on coefficient count and texture sharpness
quality.notes: higher order terms lost in truncation

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: indicates grain elongation from processing history

quality.notes: single value loses directional orientation information

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical distribution of grain boundary types
descriptors.rationale: boundary character affects diffusion and crack propagation

representation.notes: includes CSL Sigma values and random

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of boundaries with twin relationship
descriptors.rationale: twin boundaries resist crack propagation significantly

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one
representation.notes: subset of grain boundary character distribution

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per volume
descriptors.rationale: governs work hardening and yield strength

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and character types averaged
quality.notes: loses edge versus screw dislocation distinction

descriptors.name: misorientation angle distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: distribution of crystallographic misorientations between grains
descriptors.rationale: characterizes grain boundary network energy state

representation.encoding: binned histogram zero to sixty degrees

quality.loss_reason: binning and loss of misorientation axis

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of recrystallized versus deformed grains

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and grain size differences lost
quality.notes: binary classification loses partial recrystallization states

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: average interfacial energy of grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: drives grain growth and boundary migration

quality.loss_reason: distribution over boundary types collapsed to average
quality.notes: cannot reconstruct underlying boundary character distribution

descriptors.name: schmid factor distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: distribution of resolved shear stress factors

representation.encoding: histogram bins zero to point five

quality.loss_reason: binning and averaging over slip systems

descriptors.name: slip system activity
descriptors.physical_meaning: relative activation of crystallographic slip systems
descriptors.rationale: determines plastic strain distribution and texture evolution

representation.notes: FCC has twelve, BCC twenty-four systems

quality.loss_reason: spatial and temporal integration over deformation
quality.notes: loses individual grain and loading history

descriptors.name: geometrically necessary dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: dislocation density required for lattice curvature
descriptors.rationale: indicates strain gradients and geometric constraints

quality.loss_reason: spatial distribution and dislocation character averaged
quality.notes: measurement resolution limits affect derived value
